project.name: Northwood :: Product Events
project.description: Wire-format event records emitted by product-service. Consumed by every downstream context that subscribes to product master changes (inventory, sales, manufacturing, purchasing, finance, reporting). Contains the com.northwood.product.domain.events.* records plus any VOs they transitively reference (e.g. ApprovedVendor). No Spring, no JDBC, no domain behaviour — just the schema other services compile against so producer/consumer agreement is checked at build time, not runtime.
